meta.title: A CX hire that stays 5+ years | Coconut for DTC Brands
meta.description: For DTC and ecommerce founders: a senior, vetted CX pro in a managed seat that lasts. Our longest DTC placement has run more than 5 years. Matched in days.
meta.ogDescription: A senior, vetted CX pro in a managed seat that lasts. Our longest DTC placement has run more than 5 years. Matched in days.

hero.h1:
A CX hire that stays
5+ years.
hero.lead: Offshore CS has burned this category before: three months of training, then a resignation email. Coconut matches you with a senior, vetted CX pro and manages the seat so it lasts, like the brand whose CX manager just passed 47 months. Vetted profiles this week, live in days.

form.step2Sub: We match you with a CX pro who already lives in Shopify, Gorgias, and marketplace inboxes.
form.needLabel: What's eating your inbox the most?
form.successText: Keep your phone handy, we'll text you today with the CX pro profiles we matched to your brand.

hours.label: How much help do you need?

wyg.title: A senior CX pro, matched to your brand
wyg.text: Not a generalist pulled off a job board. Someone who already knows Gorgias or Zendesk, WISMO flows, returns and exchanges, and marketplace response SLAs.

wyg.title: Vetted profiles this week. You pick who to meet.
wyg.text: No cattle call resumes. No agency warm bodies. A real slate of pre-vetted candidates, and you choose who to interview.

wyg.title: Co led interview with your Client Success Manager
wyg.text: Your CSM runs it with you. We know what to listen for when hiring people who will speak in your brand's voice.

wyg.title: 40 hours of real tickets, free. Before you commit.
wyg.text: Not a test project. Not a demo. Real output in your real inbox from your matched CX pro, on us, for the first 40 hours.

wyg.title: They answer tickets. They never issue refunds you didn't approve.
wyg.text: Your CX pro works inside the helpdesk and store permissions you set. Refund thresholds, escalation rules, and store settings stay with you, and you can pull access anytime.

wyg.title: Managed Talent (month to month) or Direct Hire (one time flat fee)
wyg.text: Your call. Switch models anytime. No long term contracts, no hidden percentages.

wyg.title: Not a fit? We re match, no hassle.
wyg.text: You walk away clean, or we find the right person. Either way, you're not stuck.

ctaBanner.heading: Get out of the inbox.
ctaBanner.sub: Back to building the brand by day, off the laptop by night. See who fits, then decide.

faq.a: Yes. Your CX pro works inside your helpdesk and store with the access you grant, under NDA, and can be removed anytime. Every operator is background checked and vetted before you meet them, and the engagement is managed by Coconut with a named Client Success Manager, not left to a solo freelancer.

faq.q: Can they issue refunds or change my store settings?
faq.a: Only within limits you set. Answering tickets, processing returns per your policy, and replying to reviews do not require open refund authority. You set refund thresholds and permission levels in your helpdesk and Shopify, anything above the line escalates to you. You keep control.

faq.q: How much does Managed Talent cost?
faq.a: Plans start at $900 per month. Pricing depends on the role, experience level, and hours. Each plan includes management, payroll, benefits, and support.

faq.q: How does the 40 hour free trial work?
faq.a: Once you pick who to meet and interview them, your matched CX pro does 40 hours of real work in your real inbox, on us. Not a test project or a demo. If it clicks, you keep them. If it does not, you walk away clean.

Shopify and the helpdesks DTC brands actually run: Gorgias, Zendesk, and Freshdesk, plus marketplace consoles like Amazon Seller Central. If you run Klaviyo, Recharge, Loop, or a 3PL portal, we match for that too.

faq.q: Will my customers be able to tell it's not me?
faq.a: No, and this is the difference that matters. Your CX pro is trained on your macros, your tone guide, and your escalation rules before going live, and your Client Success Manager reviews early tickets with you. Customers get faster answers in the same voice they already know. The founders who worry most about this are usually the ones answering tickets at midnight, which shows in the replies too.

faq.q: How is this different from hiring on Upwork or OnlineJobs.ph?
faq.a: Those are databases. You filter by price, pick from whoever applied, and manage the risk yourself, which is exactly why most bad offshore hires go sideways. We headhunt and vet for your specific role, then manage payroll, benefits, and backups. Our placements hold a 98% retention rate, and if a fit is not right we re-match you at no cost.

faq.q: Will I have to manage them?
faq.a: No. A dedicated Client Success Manager runs onboarding, monitors performance, and handles the day to day. You delegate the inbox and review the output. You are not building an offshore HR function.

faq.q: How long does it take to get matched?
faq.a: You'll receive your shortlist within 5 to 10 days. Specialized or niche roles may take longer. Once you've chosen a candidate and completed interviews, you can get started right away.

faq.q: Can I change or replace my talent later on?
faq.a: Yes. If your needs change or performance dips, we'll replace your talent at no additional cost.

faq.q: Do you provide ongoing support after hiring?
faq.a: Yes. A dedicated Client and VA Success Manager monitors performance, facilitates feedback, and ensures both sides are supported long term.

faq.q: What's included in your management and payroll service?
faq.a: We handle contracts, payments, compliance, productivity tracking, and full suite benefits. You get one monthly invoice for everything.

faq.q: Can I switch between part time and full time hours?
faq.a: Yes. You can adjust your talent's schedule as your needs evolve, with a minimum of 20 hours per week to maintain stability for the talent.

faq.q: Can I buy out my talent?
faq.a: Yes. Buyouts are allowed as long as the talent agrees, with flexibility based on hours, tenure, and subscription tier.
In the Philippines. Senior, college-educated, English-fluent professionals who work an overlap shift on US business hours and are vetted before you ever meet them.
No long term contracts. Managed Talent is a month to month subscription designed for flexibility and scale.
